titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Ays Ibn Al-Qasim
Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Al-Ays Ibn Al-Qasim

segments: ه عن العيص بن القاسم فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار، عن يعقوب بن يزيد، عن صفوان بن يحيى، عن العيص بن القاسم‌.
arabic.text: ه عن العيص بن القاسم فقد رويته عن محمّد بن الحسن- رضي اللّه عنه- عن محمّد بن الحسن الصفّار، عن يعقوب بن يزيد، عن صفوان بن يحيى، عن العيص بن القاسم‌.

segments: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Ays ibn Al-Qasim has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Saffar, from Yaqub ibn Yazid, from Safwan ibn Yahya, from Al-Ays ibn Al-Qasim.
en.bab-ul-qaim-publications.text: Everything in this book that is narrated from Al-Ays ibn Al-Qasim has been transmitted by me from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Muhammad ibn Al-Hasan Al-Saffar, from Yaqub ibn Yazid, from Safwan ibn Yahya, from Al-Ays ibn Al-Qasim.
